O*NET Code Connector confirms SOC code 15-1299.09 maps to 'Information Technology Project Managers', not 'Integration Architect': https://www.onetcodeconnector.org/ccreport/15-1299.09

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic healthcare integration scenario using NextGen Connect (a real integration platform) to route HL7 v2.5 healthcare messages via MLLP protocol based on MSH-3 (Sending Application) and MSH-9 (Message Type) fields. Channel names, port number, and database table names match the task specification. However, the occupation metadata claims 'Integration Architect' but the SOC code 15-1299.09 officially corresponds to 'Information Technology Project Manager' according to the O*NET classification system maintained by the U.S. Department of Labor. The task uses real healthcare integration concepts (HL7, MLLP, NextGen Connect) but the specific message data and healthcare scenario is synthetic/educational.
